properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Oh, magnify the Lord with me, For He is worthy to be praised. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: Hosanna! Blessed be the Rock, Blessed be the Rock of my Salvation! :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: Glory, glory to His name, He lives and reigns forevermore. :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Jehovah Jireh is His name For He provideth all my needs. :/
